description: Letter from a community in an unknown location addressed to the community in Fustat. Fragment: bottom part only. In Hebrew. Written by a scribe. The preserved text conveys greetings to the the head of the Academy Maṣliaḥ. The date is added in a different hand. Dated: Elul [4]893 AM, which is 1133 CE. Signed by: Yaʿaqov b. Moshe ha-Kohen; Yisrael b. Ṭoviyya; Naḥum b. ʿEzra; Moshe b. Avraham the judge; Shemuel b. Avraham ha-Kohen; and Matitya b. Moshe Palermi (=from Palermo). On parchment. AA
description_he: מכתב מקהילה לא ידועה לקהילת פסטאט; תחתית בלבד; בעברית; על קלף; תאריך: אלול [4]893 = 1133 לספירה; מעביר ברכות לראש הישיבה מצליח
